user.title: Connect to Gemini Live
user.description: Enter a Google Gemini API key and choose how Gemini Live should respond.

data_description.api_key: Create an API key in Google AI Studio. Audio and text sent through this integration are processed by Google.
data_description.model: Preview Gemini Live model used for voice and text conversations.
data_description.voice: Prebuilt voice used for Gemini's spoken replies.
data_description.system_instruction: Optional custom personality and behavior. Home Assistant's Assist tool instructions are appended automatically.
data_description.detailed_logging: Write verbose diagnostic information to the Home Assistant log. Enable only while troubleshooting.
data_description.transcribe_gemini: Stream a transcript of Gemini's spoken reply into Home Assistant. Disabling this gives the lowest reply-audio latency.
data_description.encourage_web_search: Tell Gemini to use an exposed search-like Assist tool for current, recent, time-sensitive, or explicitly requested online information.
data_description.show_text: Expose show_text tool to allow Gemini to display formatted text to the user when transcription is OFF.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Gemini Live
reconfigure.description: Update the connection and response settings.
